title: N-Hydroxy-N, N'-Diphenylbenzamidine-A New Type of Analytical Reagent. Spectrophotometric Determination of Iron (III)
author: K. SATYANARAYANA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Govt. College of Science, Raipur 

 Department of Chemistry, Ravishankar University, Raipur (M. P.) 

  Manuscript received 9 June 1975 ; accepted 28 July 1975  

 A sensitive spectrophotometric method for the determination of Iron (Ill) Is reported using N-hydroxy-N, N'-diphenylbenzamidine. The reagent in acetone develops a red-purple colour between  p H 4.5-11.0 having its wavelength or maximum absorption at 530 mm. The colour system conformed to Beer's law between the limits 1.6-10.0 ppm or the metal.
